corrections.note: Dative feminine: article and noun both take iota subscript (ᾗ ἡμέρᾳ), not nominative ἡ ἡμέρα.

uncertain.note: First word on page breaks as καθ ̓ ἐφέ-|δετο; printed form may be καθὸ ἐφεί-|δετο (one word καθὸ + ἐφείδετο). Hard to be certain at this resolution.
Transcribed ἐθυμώτα is an unusual form; apparatus records the same string (θυμωτα] θυμωθεντα Α), so B-text may indeed print this peculiar form, but worth a second look at the image.
